excerpt: أِجْعَلُ بَیْنَ اَذاَنِکَ وَ اَقاَمَتِکَ نَفْساً لِیَفُرَغَ اَلمُتَوَضَّیءُ مِنْ وُضُوءِہِ وَالاَکِلُ مِنْ اَکَلِہِ وَ ذُوْاَلحاَجَۃِ مِنْ حاَجَتِہِ
one who hears the call to prayer while present in the mosque, yet withdraws from it, is counted among the hypocrites—excepting only the one whose ritual purity has been invalidated
source_author: Commander of the Faithful (ʿAlī) and Qāḍī al-Nuʿmān

excerpt: Let the one among you who calls to prayer be the most eloquent and the most knowledgeable
there is no impediment to a blind person giving the call to prayer if he walks upon the path of truth
source_work: Sunan sources and Twelver Shia jurisprudence
source_authority: Twelver Shia and Ismaili jurisprudential tradition

excerpt: If a man leads one person in prayer, he shall position him at his right side; should he lead two or more, they shall stand behind him
performing the ʿIshāʾ and Fajr prayers in congregation is superior to remaining awake the entire night in private devotion
source_location_hint: Merit of congregational evening and dawn prayer

excerpt: To perform ablution thoroughly despite aversion, to walk toward the mosque, and to wait for one prayer after another—these deeds wash away all sins
Among the ranks of men, the first row is the best; among the ranks of women, the last row is the best
Fasts broken by menstruation must be observed anew after purification. Yet prayers missed during menstruation require no such compensation
source_author: Qāḍī al-Nuʿmān and Twelver Shia jurisprudence

excerpt: Should a man have relations with a menstruating woman in a manner not permitted, he must seek forgiveness; if the woman conceals her menstruation, the sin falls upon her, not upon him
source_location_hint: Sin and concealment in relations during menstruation

excerpt: Do not pray in the camel's pen, but you may pray in the pen of sheep and goats
Men shall not wear rings of gold, for it is the adornment of the Hereafter
source_authority: Hadith corpus (Sunni sources: al-Nasāʾī, al-Tirmidhi; Shia sources)
source_location_hint: Prohibition of gold rings for men

excerpt: Whoever among you recites the Umm al-Kitāb behind me seeks thereby to lead the prayer
source_work: Sunan sources (al-Nasāʾī, Ibn Mājah, Abū Dāwūd)
source_location_hint: Recitation of Sūrat al-Fātiḥah behind the Imam
